title: pellaea atropurpurea
intro: Pellaea atropurpurea, also known as the Purple Cliff Brake, is a species of fern native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pellaea atropurpurea include potential uses in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Pellaea atropurpurea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
